channel.title: Habits on home
channel.description: Recent content in Habits on home

item.title: ADHD & the bloat of "productivity tools"
item.description: This post is kind of a continuation of “It’s never the right tool for the job” This is kind of a rough read. I don’t normally do in-depth editing on these posts, so if I contradict anything I say please just tell me and I’ll update the article Introduction This post is going to be written very bluntly. I am writing this from the perspective of someone who has both read self-help and has tried a multitude of different apps/services in the name of “improving myself”.

item.title: Avoiding clocks • Obsession with Numbers
item.description: I will most likely make a video on this, so for those who read the blog consider this an early-access version ;) Introduction I don’t know if this sounds extreme or not, but personally having a clock in my line of vision at all times while studying kills productivity. I don’t know if others feel the same, but personally if I have a clock and the date near by I won’t stop thinking about it.

item.title: 3 Daily Habits for 2024
item.description: Introduction After reading “The Inner Game of Tennis” and “Atomic Habits” for the first time, I started trusting myself more than ever before. The results came with it too, as I was able to perform well and improve in anything I put my mind to at a rate I had never experienced before. Then, life hit and slowly but surely to mask my true feelings, I started falling back into old habits.
